name: Vatagi Huntsman

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Set Up the Kill
abilities.text: When an ally within 6" uses a Reload token, it receives a (+) to the generated action.

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Get in There
triggers.text: A non-unique friendly model in LoS of the target may move up to 3" toward the target.

actions.name: Prepared Trap
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is cost 7 or more, this action receives a (fortitude).
actions.effects: Move the target up to 6". If the target ends this move in base contact with a marker or destructible terrain, deal 2 damage to it, then remove that terrain or marker.

triggers.name: Stashed Supplies
triggers.text: An ally within 2" of the target heals 2.

extraction_notes: Prepared Trap action lists 'Wp' under Rst and '8' under TN columns, but behaves as a tactical action with no resist requirement based on the text. Parsed as tactical action with resist: null per standard tactical action rules.
